languages.text: "Мне о том знать не положено, потому и не слушаю. Но говорят все одно: без подкрепления худо нам придется. Потому глух вдвойне — нечего страху нагонять".

traits.locale_text: "Мне о том знать не положено, потому и не слушаю. Но говорят все одно: без подкрепления худо нам придется. Потому глух вдвойне — нечего страху нагонять".

languages.text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."
languages.original_text: "Мне о том знать не положено, потому и не слушаю. Но говорят все одно: без подкрепления худо нам придется. Потому глух вдвойне — нечего страху нагонять".

traits.locale_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."
"It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."
"It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

languages.text: “这不是我该知道的事，所以我干脆不听。但大伙儿说的都一样，援军再不来，我们的麻烦就大了。所以我干脆把两只耳朵都堵起来，没必要自己吓自己。”
languages.original_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

traits.locale_text: “这不是我该知道的事，所以我干脆不听。但大伙儿说的都一样，援军再不来，我们的麻烦就大了。所以我干脆把两只耳朵都堵起来，没必要自己吓自己。”

languages.text: « Ça me regarde pas, alors j'écoute pas. Mais tout le monde dit la même chose : sans renforts, on sera dans le pétrin. C'est pour ça que j'y prête pas attention, ça sert à rien de se faire du mauvais sang. »
languages.original_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

traits.locale_text: « Ça me regarde pas, alors j'écoute pas. Mais tout le monde dit la même chose : sans renforts, on sera dans le pétrin. C'est pour ça que j'y prête pas attention, ça sert à rien de se faire du mauvais sang. »

languages.text: "Bilmek bana düşmez, o yüzden dinlemiyorum. Fakat hepsi aynı şeyi söylüyor: Takviye gelmezse başımız derde girecekmiş. Bu yüzden iki kulağımı da tıkıyorum... Korkuyu körüklemenin âlemi yok."
languages.original_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

traits.locale_text: "Bilmek bana düşmez, o yüzden dinlemiyorum. Fakat hepsi aynı şeyi söylüyor: Takviye gelmezse başımız derde girecekmiş. Bu yüzden iki kulağımı da tıkıyorum... Korkuyu körüklemenin âlemi yok."

languages.text: «No me corresponde saberlo, así que no presto atención. Pero todos dicen lo mismo: sin refuerzos, vamos a tener problemas. Por eso mantengo las orejas bien cerradas: no sirve de nada sembrar el pánico».
languages.original_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

traits.locale_text: «No me corresponde saberlo, así que no presto atención. Pero todos dicen lo mismo: sin refuerzos, vamos a tener problemas. Por eso mantengo las orejas bien cerradas: no sirve de nada sembrar el pánico».

languages.text: "Das geht mich nichts an, also höre ich ihnen nicht zu. Aber sie sagen alle dasselbe: Ohne Verstärkung haben wir ein Problem. Deshalb halte ich mir beide Ohren zu ... es bringt nichts, Angst zu schüren."
languages.original_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

traits.locale_text: "Das geht mich nichts an, also höre ich ihnen nicht zu. Aber sie sagen alle dasselbe: Ohne Verstärkung haben wir ein Problem. Deshalb halte ich mir beide Ohren zu ... es bringt nichts, Angst zu schüren."

languages.text: 「それは俺が知るべきことではないから、聞かない。でも、みんな同じことを言う。援軍が来なければ、大変なことになる。だから、俺は両耳を閉ざしている。恐怖を煽る意味はないからだ。」
languages.original_text: "It's not for me to know, so I don't listen. But they all say the same thing: without reinforcements, we'll be in trouble. That's why I keep both ears shut — no point in stirring up fear."

traits.locale_text: 「それは俺が知るべきことではないから、聞かない。でも、みんな同じことを言う。援軍が来なければ、大変なことになる。だから、俺は両耳を閉ざしている。恐怖を煽る意味はないからだ。」
